pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build will fail or produce artifacts incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target compatibility remains at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Hibernate Community Dialects to a version compatible with the new Hibernate ORM version implied by the Spring Boot upgrade.
pom.xml.why_exists: Version mismatch between Hibernate ORM and Community Dialects can cause runtime linkage errors or missing dialect classes.
